prestazioni: 3A92 MIVEC 1.2L turbocharged inline-3 engine: Full forged internals including Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 300+ HP at 25psi on E85 fuel. Precision Turbo & Engine GT3076R turbocharger with a 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 76mm compressor wheel for optimized spool and top-end power.

Custom Motec M150 ECU with full flex-fuel mapping, individual cylinder fuel trims, and launch control tuned by Haltech Platinum for precise ignition timing and boost control. HKS Hi-Power ignition coils and NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (LFR6AIX-11) for consistent combustion under high cylinder pressures.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) for the F5M42 transaxle, PTT 3.94 final drive ratio, and South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel. Cusco Type RS 2-point strut tower bar and Ultra Racing 4-point front lower arm brace to eliminate chassis flex under hard acceleration.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Mirage-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and rear diffuser. Front splitter extended 3 inches with integrated air curtains for improved aero efficiency at high speeds.

Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,200mm width) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with Gurney flaps for adjustable downforce. Custom 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in Mitsubishi Ralliart Blue (P27) with matte black accents and Ralliart decals in OEM-spec font.

OMP R1 racing seats with custom red Alcantara inserts and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display. Custom titanium bolt kit (ARP) for weight reduction and corrosion resistance.
